headline: Agent orchestration moved to the center of the week as subagents and scheduled tasks led the tooling rotation.
body: Subagents and scheduled tasks topped the tool movers, matched by engineers describing automated loops where orchestrators spawn parallel worker agents instead of manual prompting, and by Claude Cowork workflow demos covering morning briefs, inbox triage, and live dashboards. Z AI launched Z Code, a Codex-like coding agent for GLM-5.2 with a free 5 million token daily tier, extending the agentic coding push. On the technique side quantization led while probabilistic reasoning, static scheduling, text-to-speech, encoder-decoder, continual pretraining, prefill latency, and LLM-as-a-judge all broke out. In talent and structure, Noam Shazeer joined OpenAI and Meta's head of product for AI for work departed.

cited_items.title: FULLY FREE GLM-5.2 + Z-Code: This is ACTUALLY GOOD!
